metadata.description: Business Metrics Dashboard — Quality Governance Platform

settings.title: Incidents Created / Resolved (weekly)
settings.query: customMetrics | where name in ('incidents.created', 'incidents.resolved') | summarize Value=sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 7d), name | order by timestamp desc

settings.title: Complaints SLA Compliance
settings.query: customMetrics | where name == 'complaints.sla_met' or name == 'complaints.sla_breached' | summarize Value=sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 7d), name | order by timestamp desc

settings.title: Audit Completion Rate
settings.query: customMetrics | where name in ('audits.completed', 'audits.total') | summarize Value=sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 7d), name | order by timestamp desc

settings.title: DLQ Depth (failed background tasks)
settings.query: customMetrics | where name == 'dlq.size' | summarize Depth=max(value) by bin(timestamp, 1h) | order by timestamp desc | take 168

settings.title: Circuit Breaker State
settings.query: customMetrics | where name startswith 'circuit_breaker.' | summarize Value=max(value) by bin(timestamp, 5m), name | order by timestamp desc

settings.title: Risk Register Activity
settings.query: customMetrics | where name in ('risks.created', 'risks.closed', 'risks.escalated') | summarize Value=sum(value) by bin(timestamp, 7d), name | order by timestamp desc

settings.title: Active Users (DAU / WAU)
settings.query: requests | where isnotempty(user_AuthenticatedId) | summarize DAU=dcount(user_AuthenticatedId) by bin(timestamp, 1d) | order by timestamp desc | take 30
